name: South Sea Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch red tipped lettuce - torn, (6 cups)
1 11 oz can mandolin orange sections, chilled & drained
1 small onion, sliced, separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING: Combine mayonnaise, sour cream, dill pickle juice, mashed avocado, parsley, chives, and dillweed. Cover and refrigerate.
Place lettuce in a large salad bowl. Arrange mandolin orange slices, mushrooms, onion and green pepper and avocado attractively atop the lettuce. Toss salad with desired amount of chilled dressing just before serving.
